title: Software Engineering
description: Analytical thinking involves systematically breaking down complex information into smaller, manageable components to understand patterns, relationships, and root causes. It combines logic and creativity to transform data into actionable insights, moving from simply knowing "what" happened to understanding "why" and "what to do next"
